---
title: "CV"
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

<img style="float: right; width:20%; border:0px solid; margin-left: 10px" src="images/core_hf_1.jpg">

![BlumsteinCV](files/Blumstein_Meghan_CV.pdf){width=900px}


<br>

My full CV is available for download [here](files/Blumstein_Meghan_CV.pdf).
